meaning: n.[植]丁香(尤指西洋丁花)紫丁香,丁香花,淡紫色adj.淡紫色的
examples: All shades of mauve, lilac, lavender and purple were fashionable.
I give you my sprig of lilac.
Lilac is best used as a garnish.
Here, the menu is still written out by hand daily and then mimeographed in lilac-colored ink.
It's the annual Lilac Festival and crowds are strolling among acres of pale-blue blossoms.
